case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. ABDUR R. S. MUHAMMAD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUHAMMAD, ABDUR R. S. IND/DBA ACTION LAUNDRY $24,282.13 PRINCIPAL, $2,775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $837.90 INTEREST, $148.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,043.03, TOTAL JUDGMENT AMOUNT IS $28,043.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AND ADJUDGED THAT PLTF. IS THE OWNER OF THE FOLLOWING LEASED EQUIPMENT: 7 SPEED QUEEN WASHERS PHASE1; 7 BASES; 7 BOXES, WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $6300 AND IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MUHAMMAD, ABDUR R. S. IND/DBA ACTION LAUNDRY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-12-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-15-2002
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (EQUIPMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MUHAMMAD, ABDUR R. S. IND/DBA ACTION LAUNDRY
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-12-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
